overview: Anantha Lakshmi Institute of Technology and Sciences (ALITS), Anantapur, officially says the college was started in 2008 under the Anantha Lakshmi Educational Society and is located near Itukalapalli on the Anantapur-Chennai highway. The institute describes itself as a 54-acre campus serving more than 1600 students with over 130 teaching faculty members.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUA; NAAC accredited as shown on the official site.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, EEE, Mechanical, ECE, CSE, CSE (AI and ML), CSE (Data Science), CSE (AI)
M.Tech - CSE, VLSI, EPS, Structural Engineering
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Contact admissions for the latest fee structure

placements.totalOffers: 540+ recent selections listed across official placement updates
placements.companiesVisited: 15+ recent drives listed on the official site

admissions.admissionProcess: The official site provides separate admission procedure, eligibility, and fee structure pages for diploma, UG, and PG programs. Undergraduate engineering admissions are aligned with AP EAPCET and other applicable state counseling routes.
admissions.importantDates: Admission notifications and prospectus links are published on the official ALITS website, while AP EAPCET, ECET, ICET, and PGECET schedules are issued by the respective Andhra Pradesh authorities.

campus.specialNote: The official site emphasizes the green campus near S.K. University and highlights an ideal teacher-learner ratio with personalized academic attention.

contact.address: Near S.K. University, Itukalapalli, Near SKU, Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh - 515721, India
